subject: Science
heading: Life Processes
text: Nutrition is the process by which organisms obtain food. It is essential for growth, repair, and maintenance.

subject: Science
heading: Life Processes > Autotrophic Nutrition
text: Green plants prepare their own food using sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide. This process is called photosynthesis.

subject: Science
heading: Life Processes > Autotrophic Nutrition > Role of Chlorophyll
text: Chlorophyll helps absorb light energy for photosynthesis.

subject: Science
heading: Life Processes > Autotrophic Nutrition > Role of Chlorophyll
text: The glucose formed is stored as starch in plants.
